allow_instructions: Allow Nicki sheep workflow git in task worktrees: status, status --porcelain, diff, diff --staged, diff main...HEAD, log, branch, branch --show-current, remote, rev-parse, show-ref, worktree list/add, checkout, pull, fetch, merge (including origin/main and --no-ff), add, commit, push (including -u origin HEAD).
Allow Nicki start scripts: bash or direct invocation of start-worktrees.sh and register-global-status.sh, including PROJECT=<project> prefixed runs.
Allow Nicki close scripts: bash or direct invocation of unregister-global-status.sh and rm -rf -- on confirmed worktree paths.
Allow Nicki sync and integrate git after user confirmed the step: fetch, merge, add, commit, push on feature or target branches.
Allow npm and pnpm install, lint, and test for execute and review verification in worktrees.
Allow jq, mkdir -p, cp, and cat used by Nicki workflow scripts, archive copy, and HEREDOC commit messages.
Allow smoke scripts under .cursor/hooks/scripts/ and .cursor/skills/*/scripts/ when validating permissions or workflow.
block_instructions: Block chmod; invoke Nicki scripts with bash instead.
Block git push --force, git reset --hard, git merge --abort, and git checkout -- unless the user explicitly approved.
Block destructive commands outside Nicki close/sync/integrate steps the user already confirmed.
